description_long: This is a small crab with a robust, oval-shaped carapace that is mottled brown and tan, giving it a camouflaged appearance. Its two large, prominent claws are raised and display a gradient from brown at the base to a pale, almost white color at the tips. The crab has eight slender, jointed walking legs, each covered in a rough, textured exoskeleton. The underside of the crab is lighter in color, with a smoother appearance compared to the top. The eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front of the carapace, and no antennae are clearly visible. The overall form is compact and sturdy, typical of crabs found in coastal or urban waterfront environments.
description: A small, mottled brown crab with large, pale-tipped claws and eight slender legs, featuring a rough-textured carapace and eyes on short stalks.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the crab's raised claws, mottled carapace, and forward-facing eyes on short stalks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height of the raised claw and the crab's body depth, with the legs and claws stacked vertically.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the lighter, smoother underside of the crab and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs and claws.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the other raised claw and the crab's body profile, with visible segmentation and leg articulation.
